case_title: LAUREN ANDERSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, LAUREN HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-06-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF LAUREN ANDERSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-01-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, LAUREN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-01-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-02-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-16-2011
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, LAUREN
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, LAUREN
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF LAUREN ANDERSON FILED ON 3/1/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
